origin.description: Point around which rotation will be performed.

oneOf.description:
Texture used by all faces.

At this moment it should always be a reference to an id from `textures` (in `#your-texture-id` format).

texture.description:
Texture used by this face.

At this moment it should always be a reference to an id from `textures` (in `#your-texture-id` format).

uv.description: Optional UV coordinates in the range `0.0..1.0` on both axes (where `0.0, 0.0` is bottom-left and `1.0, 1.0` is top-right).

tint.description: Specifies whether to apply color of current biome to the texture.

cull_face.description: Face, if there is a block on which this face will be "skipped" when creating a chunk mesh.

parent.description: Optional path to another model whose properties will be merged with those of current model.

ambient_occlusion.description:
Specifies whether this model will create ambient occlusion.

`true` by default, but it is recommended to set `false` for models that are not a full cuboid (e.g. levers).

textures.description: Object of form key-value where key is the texture id and value is the path to the texture

elements.description: List of block elements describing the individual parts of the model.

oneOf.description: Variant representing the **same** properties for **each** of faces.

start.description: Start point in the range `0.0..1.0` for all axes.

end.description: End point in the range `0.0..1.0` for all axes.

all.description: All faces with certain UV coordinates, texture and some other parameters.

oneOf.description:
Variant representing unique properties for each of faces.

It is not necessary to describe all faces.

start.description: Start point in the range `0.0..1.0` for all axes.

end.description: End point in the range `0.0..1.0` for all axes.

faces.description: Faces with certain UV coordinates, texture and some other parameters.
